insight: When refactoring item creation from `ItemCreator.from(CompMaterial, name, lore...)` to `ItemCreator.fromMaterial(CompMaterial).name().lore()`, note that the `from()` convenience method implicitly calls `.hideTags(true)`. Forgetting to add `.hideTags(true)` to the replacement code causes extra enchantment/attribute tags to appear in item tooltips.
